sections.paragraph:
ρῦμα (ρῦμα, ατος, τό,)
Etym. *ρύω ἐρύω

I. that which is drawn:

1. τόξου ρῦμα, i. e. the Persian archers, opp. to λόγχης ἰσχύς, i. e. the Greek spearmen, Aesch.; ἐκ τόξου ρύματος from the distance of a bow- shot, Xen.

2. a towing-line, Polyb.

II. (ρύομαι) a defence, protection, Eur.; πύργου ρ. a tower of defence, Soph.
